body:
If you are dealing with a garage door that is stuck open, off its tracks, or has a broken spring that has trapped your car inside, there are several reliable local companies providing emergency and same-day garage door repairs right here in the **Pleasanton / Tri-Valley area** :

### 1\. Precision Garage Door Service of East Bay

  * **Phone:** (925) 268-9267 [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Precision%20Garage%20Door%20Service.%20Precision%20Garage%20Door,Pleasanton%2C%20CA%2094566.%20Phone%20Number%3A%20\(925\)%20268%2D9267.)

  * **Location:** 405 Boulder Court, Pleasanton, CA 94566 [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Precision%20Garage%20Door%20Service.%20Precision%20Garage%20Door,Pleasanton%2C%20CA%2094566.%20Phone%20Number%3A%20\(925\)%20268%2D9267.)

  * **Hours:** Live phone support available 24/7; appointments scheduled 7 days a week from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM (including evenings and weekends at no extra charge). [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Precision%20Garage%20Door%20Service%20is%20locally%20owned,before%20we%20pull%20out%20of%20your%20driveway.)

  * **What they offer:** Fully stocked "mobile showrooms" so they can typically replace broken torsion springs, snapped cables, or broken openers in a single visit.

### 2\. Valiant Garage Door

  * **Phone:** (925) 409-4974 [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Garage%20Door%20%7C%20Emergency%20Repair%20%26,appointment%20\(925\)%20409%2D4974%20Book%20Free%20Estimate%20Instantly.)

  * **Location:** 3588 Pimlico Dr, Pleasanton, CA 94588 [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Garage%20Door%20On%20Google.%20Find%20Valiant,same%2Dday%20service.%20Pleasanton%20Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Hub.)

  * **Hours:** Same-day emergency service and after-hours help. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Garage%20Door%20handles%20same%2DDay%20Garage%20Door,right%20service%20first.%20See%20opener%20repair%20service.)

  * **What they offer:** A local, founder-led business that specializes in emergency garage door cable repairs, safety sensors, stuck doors, and quick torsion spring replacements. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/#:~:text=Valiant%20Trust%20System.%20Founder%2Dled%20garage%20door%20service,practical%20repair%2Dfirst%20recommendations.%20%2D%2012%2B%20Years%20Experience.)

### 3\. Graham Garage Doors

  * **Phone:** Contact via their local Pleasanton dispatch [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california#:~:text=Invest%20in%20the%20longevity%20of%20your%20garage,Affordable%20Prices.%20%2D%2024%20X%207%20Emergency.)

  * **Hours:** 24/7 Emergency Assistance (Standard hours Mon–Sun, 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM). [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california#:~:text=Invest%20in%20the%20longevity%20of%20your%20garage,Affordable%20Prices.%20%2D%2024%20X%207%20Emergency.)

  * **What they offer:** Swift dispatch for emergency residential and commercial overhead door failures.

### 4\. Neighborhood Garage Door Service

  * **Phone:** (925) 418-7271 [Garage Door Repair in pleasanton|Call 925-418-7271](https://pleasanton.neighborhood-garage-door-service.com/#:~:text=Google%20Map.%20Neighborhood%20Garage%20Door%20Service.%20Neighborhood,%2D%202026.%20All%20rights%20reserved.%20top.%20Call.)

  * **Location:** Dispatch point in Pleasanton, CA 94588 [Garage Door Repair in pleasanton|Call 925-418-7271](https://pleasanton.neighborhood-garage-door-service.com/#:~:text=Google%20Map.%20Neighborhood%20Garage%20Door%20Service.%20Neighborhood,%2D%202026.%20All%20rights%20reserved.%20top.%20Call.)

  * **What they offer:** Fast-response emergency troubleshooting when your vehicle is trapped or the door is a security risk. [Garage Door Repair in pleasanton|Call 925-418-7271](https://pleasanton.neighborhood-garage-door-service.com/#:~:text=A%20broken%20garage%20door%20can%20make%20your,have%20this%20problem%20again%20in%20the%20future.)

### ⚠️ Immediate Safety Tips While You Wait:

  * **Do not pull the red emergency release cord** if the door is stuck halfway open or crooked. If a spring or cable is snapped, pulling that cord can cause the heavy door to crash down instantly.

  * **Do not try to force the door open manually** if you suspect a broken torsion spring (look for a visible split in the large spring coiled above the door). Trying to force it can burn out your garage door opener motor or cause severe injury.

What exactly is the garage door doing (or not doing) right now?
